hero.title: DATA ENGINEER AND ANALYST
hero.description: I build end-to-end data solutions: ingestion, modeling, automation, and analysis for business decisions.

event_driven_integration_api_on_gcp.title: Event-Driven Integration API on GCP
event_driven_integration_api_on_gcp.description: Event-driven Flask integration API, containerized with Docker and deployed on Cloud Run (GCP), connecting CRM/ERP system workflows through secure webhooks.

fiscal_data_platform_emissions_product_a.title: Fiscal Data Platform for Emissions & Product Analytics
fiscal_data_platform_emissions_product_a.description: Fiscal and product data platform on GCP (BigQuery) for large-scale ingestion, SKU modeling, and dashboard metrics for emissions and business analytics.

legal_data_intelligence_platform.title: Legal Data Intelligence Platform
legal_data_intelligence_platform.description: End-to-end legal data platform with serverless ingestion, Dockerized processing stages, automated procedural event detection, and analytics dashboards.

crm_analytics_platform_dbt_data_vault.title: CRM Analytics Platform with DBT & Data Vault
crm_analytics_platform_dbt_data_vault.description: CRM data platform built with DBT and Data Vault, with analytics layers on GCP, governed dashboards, and data quality alerts to reduce operational divergence.

enterprise_data_validation_framework.title: Enterprise Data Validation Framework
enterprise_data_validation_framework.description: Reusable validation and reconciliation framework across data sources to increase reliability, observability, and pipeline traceability.

documents_reader.title: Documents Reader
documents_reader.description: Pipeline for foreign trade document processing with OCR, field extraction, and automated validation. Designed to reduce manual effort and increase operational reliability.

cotation_scraper.title: Cotation Scraper
cotation_scraper.description: Automation for freight quote collection and comparison with daily orchestration, consolidated outputs, and scalable source expansion.

ic_machine_learning.title: IC Machine Learning
ic_machine_learning.description: Academic project focused on machine learning experimentation and performance analysis to support modeling decisions.

pcg_analise_de_dados.title: Energy Data Analysis
pcg_analise_de_dados.description: Energy data analysis and comparison project with dashboarding, SQL workflows, and a React interface, using AWS components for delivery and decision support.

codex_discord_gateway.title: Codex Discord Gateway
codex_discord_gateway.description: Recent project focused on Discord-based integration and automation for technical productivity, flow control, and extensibility.

aes_code_in_c.title: AES Code in C
aes_code_in_c.description: AES encryption implementation in C showcasing strong foundations in algorithms, memory handling, and low-level performance.

lucas_personal_portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
lucas_personal_portfolio.description: This React + Vite portfolio presents projects, experience, and data engineering focus with route-based navigation and scalable case structure.

linus_2026.title: Mid-level Data Engineer
linus_2026.description:
- Developed ETL/ELT pipelines integrating data from platforms such as Shopify, Omie, and Tiny ERP.
- Modeled analytics layers in BigQuery for reliable reporting.
- Built strategic dashboards for sales, marketing, and operations.
- Deployed APIs and automations in Docker on GCP.

excel_santos_2025.title: Mid-level Data Engineer
excel_santos_2025.description:
- Automated maritime freight quote scraping with Python and Playwright.
- Built data pipelines and Power BI dashboards integrated with SharePoint and Salesforce.
- Modeled logistics and financial datasets for operational and commercial KPIs.
- Integrated OpenAI API workflows and deployed services in Docker on Azure.

cp_legal_claims_2024.title: Junior Data Analyst
cp_legal_claims_2024.description:
- Automated legal journal scraping with AWS Lambda/S3.
- Structured and queried unstructured data in MongoDB and BigQuery.
- Built ELT pipelines with DBT and Data Vault standards.
- Delivered dashboards and quality alerts to reduce manual rework.

lecex_brasil_2023.title: Junior Data Analyst
lecex_brasil_2023.description:
- Developed financial and marketing dashboards to improve predictability.
- Integrated data from multiple SQL sources into unified flows.
- Built Python automations to accelerate analytics operations and remove repetitive work.

sbc_regional_2024.description: My team was the best-performing among teams from smaller centers in the regional competition.
